info.title: OpenAI API
info.description: The OpenAI REST API. Please see https://platform.openai.com/docs/api-reference for more details.

note: Full spec has 99 paths and 477 schemas (1.5MB). Fetch the YAML from the source and convert: python3 -c "import json,yaml; print(json.dumps(yaml.safe_load(open('openapi.yaml').read()), indent=2))"
